Plan today: Ride runner. 7512, 7492=only supports to engage. 7560, 7568, 7597 next set of targets https://t.co/40bC4YOWS9

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text:

Then 7611, 7636 bonus. Ride runner https://t.co/uU6t07O5VX

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Good late day volatility expansion. 7521 must reclaim now to rally. 7506 remains a high risk scalp just above there. We already got this one earlier. 7482 is support which is now well tested. NEwsletter out soon with entries

updates.tweet_text: @KnightTrader999 Have to remember that yesteday's 7511 long wasn't my first long. I'd been long since the Sunday 6pm 7421 Failed Breakdown, so my cost basis isn't at 7516 its much lower. Its just a 10% runner though so it doesn't really matter either way
